chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 289 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For further orders as Counsel for applicant has not filed the amended cause title nor paid cost and copies for issuance of notice to respondents. 09.11.2016. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Shaikh learned Counsel for applicant does not want to press this Revision Application as, according to him, the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court. His vakalatnama has authorized him to compromise or withdraw the matter. However, he will comply the office note particularly will pay the costs. With the above observation, Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application. JUDGE
